snippets.comment: She's an amazing person, very kind and chill, but the class is tough. I never used to study and this class forced me to. You must attend every lecture or you'll fall behind. She drops the lowest exam and gives lots of practice. Great professor stats is just really tough

I wish I had been more engaged at the start of the semester. She is someone who is passionate about math and teaching, always willing to help answer questions and accommodate student needs. Textbook is free and provided, but if you follow along with her lecture notes (provided) and do the homework y

Her 4 hour class was challenging but manageable. Homework is very minimal, assignments are short and consist of 5 multiple choice questions. In-class assignments are crucial for points and study material. She offers plenty of extra credit and is an excellent, understanding teacher who makes the mate
